title: As Trump Mulls Decision About Iran War Deal, a Restive Middle East Waits to Hear
summary_full: The president has wavered on whether to move ahead with an agreement with Iran to end the war. On Friday, he vowed to make a “final determination” soon.
summary_public: The president has wavered on whether to move ahead with an agreement with Iran to end the war. On Friday, he vowed to make a “final determination” soon.
